texto: He does manage the bookstore, which is currently my favorite place on earth." Her eyes glazed over. "All those books. If I married him, I could probably work there the rest of my life. Nothing would make me happier.""What about love?" Ve asked."Oh," Harper said solemnly. "I love books.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Heather Blake que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “He does manage the bookstore, which is currently my favorite place on earth." Her eyes glazed ove…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, books, funny, com foco em trabalho e funny.

frase_original: He does manage the bookstore, which is currently my favorite place on earth." Her eyes glazed over. "All those books. If I married him, I could probably work there the rest of my life. Nothing would make me happier.""What about love?" Ve asked."Oh," Harper said solemnly. "I love books.
